name: S3_registry_bitmap
description: Standalone runner: parses name[:params], looks name up in a fixed registry, sets its bit in a bitmap, returns the bitmap; 255 if no args, 254 if a name is unknown. (Params are ignored here.)
io_hint: Split name[:params], but match only by exact name against the registry; parameters after : must not influence matching. Traverse all tokens and set the corresponding bits (here names 0 and 2), independent of order or parameter text.
